summary: Comprehensive testing of Merchant Follow Up enhanced SMS platform. Fixed critical route ordering issue in backend. All 26 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with proper functionality.

fixed.issue: Enhanced routes (/campaigns/enhanced, /followups/today) returning 404 due to route ordering conflict
fixed.fix: Moved enhanced router inclusion BEFORE main api_router in server.py to ensure proper route matching

seed_data_creation: Created test data during API tests: TEST_Website Contact Form, TEST_30-Day Revival campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enhanced features are working. Route ordering fix was applied to ensure enhanced routes are matched before generic routes. Test data prefixed with TEST_ was created during testing.

features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Login with template_test@example.com / password123 works correctly
features_tested.enhanced_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats (Total Clients, Pending Reminders, Today's Follow-ups, Active Campaigns), analytics metrics (Messages Sent, Replies, Response Rate), Quick Actions panel
features_tested.drip_campaigns: PASS - Page loads, shows empty state with 'No campaigns yet', has 'New Campaign' button
features_tested.analytics: PASS - Shows metrics (Messages Sent: 1, Replies: 0, Response Rate: 0%), Top Templates, Campaign Performance, Tips section
features_tested.lead_capture: PASS - Has Forms, CSV Import, Webhooks tabs. Shows created test form with embed code
features_tested.sms_compliance: PASS - Shows stop keywords (STOP, UNSUBSCRIBE, CANCEL, END, QUIT, OPTOUT), Opt-Outs tab, Quiet Hours, Consent Settings
features_tested.dead_lead_revival: PASS - Page loads, shows test campaign, has 'New Revival Campaign' button, Revival Best Practices section
features_tested.navigation_sidebar: PASS - Organized sections (Automation: Drip Campaigns, Lead Revival; Growth: Lead Capture, Analytics; Settings: SMS Compliance, Phone Numbers, etc.)

mocked_apis_note: SMS sending via Twilio/Telnyx, Voice calls, Gift ordering, Domain purchasing are UI placeholders (MOCKED)
